headline: Trump DE-ESCALATES 😤🚫 MN ICE OP After Nurse BBQ 💥👮‍♂️🍔
text:
ORANGE MAN 🍊👨‍💼 Trump DADDY dropping the BOMBSHELL 💣📢 on Foxxy News 🦊: 'We're DE-ESCALATING 😮‍💨🚪 a lil' in Minnesota after TWO BAD SHOOTINGS 😱💥 of US CITIZENS by FED ICE GOONS 🧊👮‍♂️!' First Renee Good 👩 RIP 💀 earlier this month, then ICU NURSE HERO Alex Pretti 🏥❤️⚕️ got SMOKED 🔥🔫 this weekend during IMMIGRATION OP – locals RAGING 🤬🔥 calling for Trump to PULL THE PLUG 🚫🇲🇳 on 3K AGENTS! Protests POPPIN' OFF 🎉😡 nationwide, even BI-PARTY LAWMAKERS SIMPIN' 🤡📜 for answers!

Trump at Iowa RALLY 🎤🚀: 'TERRIBLE 😢💔 both times, VERY UNFORTUNATE for Pretti the VET NURSE 🏥🐶!' Reporters GRILLIN' 🔥❓ if guy's a 'DOMESTIC TERRORIST 🧨🇺🇸' – Trump: 'Nah, ain't heard that 👂❌... but SHOULDN'T PACK HEAT 🔫🚫!' DHS BOSS Kristi Noem 🧢👩‍💼 SPILLIN' TEA ☕: 'Pretti wasn't PEACEFUL ✌️, he was VIOLENCE VIBE CHECK 💥🩸 BRANDISHIN' GUN!' But EYEWITNESSES 👀 & LOCALS YEETIN' that LIE 🤥: 'PHONE 📱 in hand, not strap! Gun LEGAL & already DISARMED 🔓 before BBQ!' CBP REPORT 📄🔍 contradicts DHS BS – NO 'reaching for weapon' mention, just AGENTS BLASTIN' 😩💨!

DHS PULLIN' PLUG 🔌 on MN MISSION BOSS Gregory Bovino 🥾👮‍♂️, sendin' WHITE HOUSE BORDER TSAR Tom Homan 🛡️🇺🇸 to SLAY! Homan POSTIN' 💬📱 met Gov Tim Walz 😴🧢, Mayor Jacob Frey 🤡🏙️ & cops – but locals STILL THIRSTY 😡💦 for 3K ICE DADDIES to GTFO 🚪👋! Trump DEFENDS OP: 'We BAGGED THOUSANDS of HARDENED CRIMINALS 🏴‍☠️🔒 – crime DROPPED 📉✅!' Then: 'Tom's THERE NOW, de-escalatin' 😏📉.' Stephen Miller 🧠😈 on CNN: 'We TOLD DHS to BARRICADE 🚧 arrest teams from DISRUPTORS 🤪 – evaluatin' why CBP TEAM FUMBLED 🏈💥!'

Even GOP SIMPS like VT Gov Phil Scott 🍎 & Sen Pete Ricketts 🐶 callin' for INVESTIGATION 🔍🕵️‍♂️: 'HORRIFYING 😱 – want TRANSPARENT PROBE 📊✅!' Fed JUDGE BLOCKIN' DHS from SHREDDIN' EVIDENCE 🛡️🚫📜. Trump at RALLY ignores MN DRAMA 🎭, hypes IMMIGRATION CRACKDOWN 🛡️🇺🇸 citin' Harvard Poll 📈: 80% AMURKANS BACK DEPORTIN' CRIMINAL ILLEGALS 🚔👮‍♂️! Noem vs Walz BEEF 🥩😤, Pretti PHONE-GUN MIXUP 🤷‍♂️📱🔫, Trump pivotin' like a PRO 🕺 – MN ICE ORGY 💦🧊 TURNING into DE-ESCALATE DANCE OFF 🕺💃‼️ Walz cryin' 😭, Homan bossin' 👑, Miller schemin' 🧠 – STAY TUNED for more BORDER BEDLAM 🛏️🔥!
